opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a constant, deep ache in my stomach and back, and I can feel a pulse beating hard in my belly.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has been getting worse all evening and I felt lightheaded when I stood up, so my wife called for help.

symptom_narrative.duration: around 12 hours and it has been building all evening
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it has steadily got worse through the evening and won't ease
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the middle of my stomach, going through to my lower back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant — it hasn't come and gone
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help, and lying still is the only thing I can manage
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps building on its own; standing up makes me feel faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can feel a strong pulse or throbbing in my belly, and I went lightheaded and nearly fainted when I stood up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm just lying flat on the bed because moving or standing makes me feel like I'll pass out

past_medical_history.how_managed: I take a blood pressure tablet every day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: usually fit and independent; lives with his wife, who is very worried by how suddenly this came on

objective_data_offered.value: my wife says I look pale and washed out
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's visual impression over the phone, not a measured finding

objective_data_offered.value: I can feel a strong pulse or throbbing in the middle of my belly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own subjective sensation, not an examination finding

objective_data_offered.value: I felt lightheaded and nearly fainted when I stood up
